features: Fresh top notes of lavadin, ginger and mint and a heart note with aromas of geranium, cosmofruit and aquaflora
Thanks to the long-lasting fragrance composition, the after shave is the perfect companion for the whole day
The formula is vegan and dermatologically tested
Sustainably packaged: the bottle of the After Shave is made from 25 percent recycled glass, the cap is made from 50 percent recycled plastic
description: Product Description UEFA Best of the Best Aftershave is a fresh fragrance that allows you to do your best. Natural ingredients such as mint and ginger essential oil provide an energy boost. A refreshing aftershave with long-lasting fragrance and vegan formula. Recycled materials have been used for the packaging of UEFA Best of the Best Aftershaves: the bottle is made from 25% recycled glass, the cap is made from 50% recycled plastic. Ingredients ALCOHOL DENAT., AQUA/WATER/EAU, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, PEG-40 HYDROGENATED CASTOR OIL, PERFUME/FRAGRANCE, LIMONENE, LINALOOL, ALLANTOIN, BUTYL
